blocks.body: Passive Voice is a large section on the passive: the core formula, passive in tenses, passive infinitive and gerund, by-phrase, causative, style and common mistakes.

{ "title": "3. Section structure", "items": [ "The passive in different tenses: Present/Past/Future Simple, Continuous, Perfect.", "Negatives and questions: how to form interrogative and negative passive structures.", "The passive with modal verbs: can/could/must/should be done.", "The infinitive and gerund in the passive: to be done, being done, having been done.", "Get-passive and impersonal passive: special constructions.", "Causative structures (have/get something done): when someone does something for you.", "The passive with ditransitive and phrasal verbs: key details.", "Restrictions, style, and common mistakes." ] }
